report_name: Unpatched Flaws in Claude Chrome Extension Expose Google Workspace Data

attack_patterns.name: Software Extensions
attack_patterns.description: A malicious browser extension can exploit vulnerabilities in the legitimate 'Claude for Chrome' extension to perform unauthorized actions.

attack_patterns.name: JavaScript
attack_patterns.description: A malicious extension injects a script on the claude.ai domain to programmatically trigger actions in the Claude extension, bypassing user consent.

attack_patterns.name: Email Collection: Remote Email Collection
attack_patterns.description: The exploit allows a malicious extension to instruct the Claude extension to read and exfiltrate the content of a user's Gmail messages.

attack_patterns.name: Automated Collection
attack_patterns.description: A malicious script can programmatically instruct the Claude extension to access and collect data from Google Workspace, including Docs and Calendar entries, without direct user interaction.

tools.name: Claude for Chrome
tools.description: A popular AI assistant browser extension by Anthropic that contains unpatched vulnerabilities allowing a second malicious extension to access Google Workspace data.

vulnerabilities.name: Claude for Chrome Broken Trust Boundary
vulnerabilities.description: Two unpatched vulnerabilities in the 'Claude for Chrome' extension related to a broken trust boundary. The extension's click handler does not validate whether a command was triggered by a legitimate user click or a synthetic one from another extension's script, allowing for unauthorized actions.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: The developer of the vulnerable 'Claude for Chrome' browser extension.

identities.name: Google Workspace
identities.description: The platform whose data (including Gmail, Google Docs, and Google Calendar) is exposed by the vulnerabilities in the Claude for Chrome extension.

relationships.target_name: Claude for Chrome Broken Trust Boundary

relationships.source_name: Claude for Chrome Broken Trust Boundary

relationships.target_name: Claude for Chrome Broken Trust Boundary
